title: Connect Boards column - connect board via API

posts.author: Roy (Roy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I know that it is possible to connect items in the Connect Boards column via the api, once the column is already connected to a board.
I wonder, is there a way to connect a board if there is no board connected yet to the column? If so, how?

Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Roy!

Currently, to connect items using our API, the board(s) these items reside in (board B) must be connect to the current board (board A) manually.

If this step is not completed, an error will be raised.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: vchan (Victor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Matias,
Is there a way using the API to add a board to a connect board column?
For clarity, is there a way to use the API to automate the following:

image844×431 37.6 KB

Thank you!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @vchan,

As of today, there is no way of doing that via API.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: psvt (Pavel)
posts.cookedHtml: 2 years passed. still no way to connect boards via API?
